search_query: Roost beer garden live music schedule
combined_text: Village Calendar April 2018Live Music Live Music: Elderberry Jam Thursday, April 12 | 5:00 pm - 8:00 pm Join us at Roost, our seasonal beer garden, for live music on the porch, local beer on tap, wine by the glass and artisan wood-fired pizza! Pull up a chair around the water fountain or under large oaks, and enjoy
